title: loorts fancy
description:
LOORTS FANCY 
is an adventure and exploration modpack where dungeons abound.
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a232c5ac2d97ff9c18cb732bf3f53076e1e613f.png)
an adventure and mystery modpack where you will have to discover dungeons and bosses.

This modpack aims to transform minecraft in an adventure of many things in the world that you will have to discover.

this modpack contains 133 mods in total.

what does it bring?

- **dungeons 🕌**
- **bosses ♟️**
- **weapons 🗡️**
- **armor 🛡️**
- **magic 🪄**
- **world enhanced 🌍**
- **nether enhanced 🌋**
- **end enhanced 🔮** 
- **enhanced animal 🦦**
- **enhanced vanilla dungeons 🏛️**
- **mysterious caves 🌀**
- **airplanes 🪶**
- **new combat ⚔️**
- **improved villages 💒**
- **backpacks 🎒**
- **block calcination 🔥**
- **decorations ✨**
- **new dimension 🌌**
- **new animations 🎎**
- **realistic sounds 🔊**
- **seasons of the year🍂**

and more things that you have to discover by yourself
  
the recommended ram is between 6 and 8 of ram but with 4 you can go half normal.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12647fa6a1dd628a43e185d0961b4ea40966b590.png)
